model.Airbnb_bq_proj.dim_hosts_cleansed.name: dim_hosts_cleansed
model.Airbnb_bq_proj.dim_hosts_cleansed.description: Cleansed dimension table for Airbnb hosts
model.Airbnb_bq_proj.dim_hosts_cleansed.compiledCode:
with  __dbt__cte__src_hosts as (
with raw_hosts as (
    select * from `mysampleproject-491106`.`dbt_raw`.`raw_hosts`
)
select
    id as host_id,
    name as host_name,
    is_superhost,
    created_at,
    updated_at
from raw_hosts
), src_hosts as(
    select * from __dbt__cte__src_hosts
)
select
    host_id,
    ifnull(host_name, 'Anonymous') as host_name,
    is_superhost,
    created_at,
    updated_at
from src_hosts

is_superhost.description: Indicates if the host is a superhost

created_at.description: Timestamp when the host record was created

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the host record was last updated

model.Airbnb_bq_proj.dim_listings_w_host.name: dim_listings_w_hosts
model.Airbnb_bq_proj.dim_listings_w_host.rawCode:
with
l as (
    select * from {{ ref('dim_listings_cleansed') }}
),
h as (
    select * from {{ ref('dim_hosts_cleansed') }}
)

select
    l.listing_id,
    l.listing_name,
    l.room_type,
    l.minimum_nights,
    l.price,
    l.host_id,
    h.host_name,
    h.is_superhost as host_is_superhost,
    l.created_at,
    greatest(l.updated_at, h.updated_at) as updated_at
from l
left join h on l.host_id = h.host_id
model.Airbnb_bq_proj.dim_listings_w_host.compiledCode:
with
l as (
    select * from `mysampleproject-491106`.`dbt_airbnb`.`dim_listings_cleansed`
),
h as (
    select * from `mysampleproject-491106`.`dbt_airbnb`.`dim_hosts_cleansed`
)

select
    l.listing_id,
    l.listing_name,
    l.room_type,
    l.minimum_nights,
    l.price,
    l.host_id,
    h.host_name,
    h.is_superhost as host_is_superhost,
    l.created_at,
    greatest(l.updated_at, h.updated_at) as updated_at
from l
left join h on l.host_id = h.host_id

model.Airbnb_bq_proj.dim_listings_cleans.name: dim_listings_cleansed
model.Airbnb_bq_proj.dim_listings_cleans.description: Cleansed dimension table for Airbnb listings
model.Airbnb_bq_proj.dim_listings_cleans.rawCode:
with src_listings as(
    select * from {{ ref('src_listings') }}
)
select
    listing_id,
    listing_name,
    room_type,
    case
        when minimum_nights = 0 then 1
        else minimum_nights
    end as minimum_nights,
    host_id,
    price,
    created_at,
    updated_at
from src_listings
model.Airbnb_bq_proj.dim_listings_cleans.compiledCode:
with  __dbt__cte__src_listings as (
with raw_listings as (
    select * from `mysampleproject-491106`.`dbt_raw`.`raw_listings`
)
select
    id as listing_id,
    name as listing_name,
    listing_url,
    room_type,
    minimum_nights,
    host_id,
    price,
    created_at,
    updated_at
from raw_listings
), src_listings as(
    select * from __dbt__cte__src_listings
)
select
    listing_id,
    listing_name,
    room_type,
    case
        when minimum_nights = 0 then 1
        else minimum_nights
    end as minimum_nights,
    host_id,
    price,
    created_at,
    updated_at
from src_listings

tests.name: not_null
tests.compiled_code:
select *
from `mysampleproject-491106`.`dbt_airbnb`.`dim_listings_cleansed`
where listing_id is null

tests.name: unique
tests.compiled_code:
with dbt_test__target as (

  select listing_id as unique_field
  from `mysampleproject-491106`.`dbt_airbnb`.`dim_listings_cleansed`
  where listing_id is not null

)

select
    unique_field,
    count(*) as n_records

from dbt_test__target
group by unique_field
having count(*) > 1

room_type.description: Type of room offered in the listing

tests.name: accepted_values
tests.compiled_code:
with all_values as (

    select
        room_type as value_field,
        count(*) as n_records

    from `mysampleproject-491106`.`dbt_airbnb`.`dim_listings_cleansed`
    group by room_type

)

select *
from all_values
where value_field not in (
    'Entire home/apt','Private room','Shared room','Hotel room'
)

minimum_nights.description:
Minimum number of nights required to rent this property.

Keep in mind that old listings might have 'minimum_nights' set
to 0 in the source tables. Our cleansing algorithm updates this to '1'.

host_id.description: Foreign key referencing the host table

tests.name: not_null
tests.compiled_code:
select *
from `mysampleproject-491106`.`dbt_airbnb`.`dim_listings_cleansed`
where host_id is null

tests.name: relationships_where
tests.compiled_code:
with left_table as (

  select
    host_id as id

  from `mysampleproject-491106`.`dbt_airbnb`.`dim_listings_cleansed`

  where host_id is not null
    and 1=1

),

right_table as (

  select
    host_id as id

  from `mysampleproject-491106`.`dbt_airbnb`.`dim_hosts_cleansed`

  where host_id is not null
    and 1=1

),

exceptions as (

  select
    left_table.id,
    right_table.id as right_id

  from left_table

  left join right_table
         on left_table.id = right_table.id

  where right_table.id is null

)

select * from exceptions

tests.name: minimum_row_count
tests.compiled_code:
select count(*) as row_count
 from `mysampleproject-491106`.`dbt_airbnb`.`dim_listings_cleansed`
 having count(*) < 1000

model.Airbnb_bq_proj.fct_reviews.name: fct_reviews
model.Airbnb_bq_proj.fct_reviews.compiledCode:
with  __dbt__cte__src_reviews as (
with raw_reviews as(
    select * from `mysampleproject-491106`.`dbt_raw`.`raw_reviews`
)
select
    listing_id,
    date as review_date,
    reviewer_name,
    comments as review_comments,
    sentiment as review_sentiment
from raw_reviews
), src_reviews as(
    select * from __dbt__cte__src_reviews
)

select
to_hex(md5(cast(coalesce(cast(listing_id as string), '_dbt_utils_surrogate_key_null_') || '-' || coalesce(cast(review_date as string), '_dbt_utils_surrogate_key_null_') || '-' || coalesce(cast(reviewer_name as string), '_dbt_utils_surrogate_key_null_') || '-' || coalesce(cast(review_comments as string), '_dbt_utils_surrogate_key_null_') as string)))
as review_id,
* from src_reviews
where review_comments is not null


    AND review_date > (select max(review_date) from `mysampleproject-491106`.`dbt_airbnb`.`fct_reviews`)

model.Airbnb_bq_proj.mart_fullmoon_revie.name: mart_fullmoon_reviews
model.Airbnb_bq_proj.mart_fullmoon_revie.rawCode:
{{ config(materialized='table') }}

with fct_reviews as (
    select
        *
    from {{ ref('fct_reviews') }}
),
full_moon_dates as (
    select
        *
    from {{ ref('seed_full_moon_dates') }}
)

select
r.*,
case
    when d.full_moon_date is null then 'not full moon'
    else 'full moon'
end as is_full_moon
from fct_reviews r left join full_moon_dates d
    on cast(r.review_date as date) = date_add(d.full_moon_date, interval 1 day)

case

    else 'full moon'
end as is_full_moon
from fct_reviews r left join full_moon_dates d
    on cast(r.review_date as date) = date_add(d.full_moon_date, interval 1 day)
